matter: NRG Bloom Inc. v. TON Infrastructure Ltd.
summary: Full synchronization brief: 13-day update (Mar 9-22), Aegis-Sentinel cross-reference results, wallet attribution theory (evidence/inference/open questions), litigation update (Mar 24 deadline), Coldstorm business updates, and cooperation protocol for ongoing bi-directional intelligence sharing via shared Drive folder.

sections.1: Aegis-Sentinel cross-reference results (mining telemetry vs blockchain forensics)
sections.2: Current theory of TON mining operation (confirmed vs inferred vs open)
sections.3: Full litigation update (Mar 9-22): mediation, Dayo letter, SOC v2, March 24 deadline
sections.4: Coldstorm AI business updates: Swiss Fox, Arkham partnership, crypto tracer, legal outreach
sections.5: Cooperation protocol: shared Drive folder, naming conventions, standing orders, capabilities exchange

key_findings: Aegis March 6 blip = migration test linking old workspace to new wallet
Jan 27 shutdown was Ola sabotage (instant telemetry drop confirms physical power kill)
TON 6x'd fleet from 47 to ~283 machines post-termination
TON hardened position to $0.00 while earning $790/day - caught lying by Dayo
March 24 deadline in 2 days - all available remedies if TON doesn't engage
requested_from_aegis: Worker IDs for March 6 blip (which 20 workers appeared?)
Historical revenue totals for partnership period (Jan 6-26)
Post-Feb-3 email intel if Daily Scanner caught anything

cooperation_protocol.sync_frequency: weekly minimum, immediate on critical events

next_sync: within 7 days or upon critical event
